message.content: Run ALL of the following bash commands in the project directory C:\Users\User\citedby-ai and report EVERY result. This is a read-only audit. Do NOT modify any files. **Audit 7 — Accessibility:** ```bash cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai echo "=== Images sans alt ===" grep -rn ".*<" | head -20 ``` ```bash cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai echo "=== Liens sans texte ===" grep -rn ".*<" | head -20 ``` ```bash cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai echo "=== Inputs sans labels (count) ===" grep -rn "

content.text: I'll run all six audit commands in parallel.

input.command: cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && echo "=== Images sans alt ===" && grep -rn "
input.description: Find img tags without alt attribute

input.command: cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && echo "=== Boutons sans texte accessible ===" && grep -rn "<button" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | grep -v "aria-label\|>.*<" | head -20
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && echo "=== Liens sans texte ===" && grep -rn "<a " --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | grep -v "aria-label\|>.*<" | head -20

cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && echo "=== Inputs sans labels (count) ===" && grep -rn "<input\|<select\|<textarea" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | grep -v "aria-label\|id=.*label" | wc -l

cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && echo "=== Problemes de contraste potentiels (count) ===" && grep -rn "text-slate-600\|text-zinc-600\|text-gray-600\|text-\[var(--text-disabled)\]" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | wc -l

cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && echo "=== Details contraste ===" && grep -rn "text-slate-600\|text-zinc-600\|text-gray-600\|text-\[var(--text-disabled)\]" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | head -20
input.description: Show first 20 potential contrast issue details
